top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 93, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Bluewater International Gran Fondo's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
Bluewater International Gran Fondo's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 93 miles.
Bluewater International Gran Fondo's mixed terrain rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Bluewater International Gran Fondo. Train it until it feels boring.
At Bluewater International Gran Fondo, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 93 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
When someone attacks on mixed terrain, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 93 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Bluewater International Gran Fondo, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Bluewater International Gran Fondo's mixed terrain actually does to you.
2-minute all-out efforts on mixed terrain. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.

race_overlay.heat: August in Sarnia, Ontario, Canada can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Bluewater International Gran Fondo. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Bluewater International Gran Fondo’s 93 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Bluewater International Gran Fondo requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, Race Simulation, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 93 miles of mixed terrain in Sarnia, Ontario, Canada.
